name: Cookies and Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients except cookies. Mix at low speed until moistened.
4. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
5. Stir in the crushed cookies.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-35 minutes or until tested done.
7. Cool layers.
8. For frosting: In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup powdered sugar, shortening, vanilla and egg whites. Blend well.
9. Beat in remaining sugar until frosting is smooth.
10. Fill and frost cake.
11. Arrange whole cookies on end and on top of frosted cake.
